title: vaccinium stenolobum
intro: Vaccinium stenolobum, also known as the Andean blueberry or blueberry of the Andes, is a type of shrub native to the Andean region in South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of antioxidants, which help protect against cell damage and inflammation. The health benefits of Vaccinium stenolobum include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Vaccinium stenolobum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or supplement, and is also used in jams and preserves, making it a versatile and valuable resource in traditional medicine.
